transcript: Speaker A: श्रीधरच्या शब्दांनी सायली दुखावली होती. पण तेच शब्द तिचं आयुष्य बदलणार होते. [Sayali was hurt by Shridhar's words. But those same words were going to change her life.] Speaker B: मी एकटाच कमावतो इथे... तुझे कपडे, जेवण, मुलांची school fees... तुझं काय योगदान आहे? [I am the only one earning here... your clothes, food, kids' school fees... what is your contribution?] Speaker C: अहो... मी प्रयत्न तर करतेय ना! [Oh... I am trying, right!] Speaker B: तुला English पण येत नाही... कोणी job पण देणार नाही तुला. [You don't even know English... nobody will even give you a job.] Speaker A: तेवढ्यात दाराची घंटी वाजली... आणि तिची पाडोसी वैभवी आली. [Just then the doorbell rang... and her neighbor Vaibhavi came.] Speaker D: तुमचं भांडण ऐकलं मी. अगं तू AI वरून English practice का नाही करत? [I heard your fight. Why don't you practice English using AI?] Speaker C: AI वरून? ते कसं? [Using AI? How's that?] Speaker D: मलाही job असंच मिळालं. एक AI App आहे, MySivi App. त्यात AI मराठीत समजवून English शिकवतो. [I also got a job like this. There is an AI App, MySivi App. In it, AI explains in Marathi and teaches English.] Speaker C: पण खरंच फरक पडेल का? आणि पैसे किती लागतील? [But will it really make a difference? And how much money will it cost?] Speaker D: ५० लाख लोक आधीच शिकतायत. आणि तू फक्त १ रुपये मध्ये सुरू करू शकतेस. [50 lakh people are already learning. And you can start for just 1 rupee.] Speaker C: सुरू करते मग. [I'll start then.] Speaker A: MySivi ॲपवर ती रोज AI सोबत practice करू लागली. मराठीत समजवून AI ने तिला हळूहळू English बोलायला शिकवलं. शेवटी तिची मेहनत फळाला आली. [On MySivi app, she started practicing daily with AI. Explaining in Marathi, AI slowly taught her to speak English. Finally, her hard work paid off.] Speaker B: Sorry... मी तुझ्याशी तसं बोलायला नको होतं. [Sorry... I shouldn't have spoken to you like that.] Speaker C: शिकायला कधीच उशीर नसतो. [It's never too late to learn.] Speaker A: अपमानाला कधीही motivation बनवा. MySivi App वर फक्त ₹१ पासून आपली English शिकण्याची जर्नी सुरू करा. [Always turn insults into motivation. Start your English learning journey on MySivi App for just ₹1.]

You are hired. Salary: ₹64800 per annum. Sorry... मी तुझ्याशी तसं बोलायला नको होतं [Sorry... I shouldn't have spoken to you like that] शिकायला कधीच उशीर नसतो [It's never too late to learn] अपमानाला kadhihi motivation बनवा. [Always turn insults into motivation.] MySivi App वर फक्त ₹१ पासून आपली English शिकण्याची जर्नी सुरू करा. [Start your English learning journey on MySivi App for just ₹1.]
summary: A Marathi housewife is shamed by her husband for not knowing English and not earning. Her neighbor introduces her to the MySivi app, where she learns English through Marathi-based AI lessons. She gets a job, earns her husband's respect, and viewers are invited to start learning for just 1 rupee.
